scripts.build:dev: TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun install && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun run icons && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local electrobun build && bun ../../scripts/stamp-desktop-windows-icons.ts
scripts.build:canary: TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun install && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun run icons && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local electrobun build --env=canary && bun ../../scripts/stamp-desktop-windows-icons.ts
scripts.build:stable: TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun install && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun run icons && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local electrobun build --env=stable && bun ../../scripts/stamp-desktop-windows-icons.ts
scripts.dev: TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local bun run build:dev && TAR_OPTIONS=--force-local electrobun dev
